message:
test(oracle): add 8 conformance tests for COALESCE, LIKE/GLOB, recursive CTE, arithmetic, COLLATE, aggregates, subqueries, and CAST/typeof

New oracle probes comparing FrankenSQLite against C SQLite (rusqlite):
- COALESCE/NULLIF/IIF nested combinations
- LIKE/GLOB pattern matching with escape chars
- WITH RECURSIVE (counter, fibonacci, factorial, powers)
- Arithmetic edge cases (overflow, division by zero, modulo, precedence)
- COLLATE NOCASE/BINARY string comparisons
- GROUP_CONCAT, DISTINCT, TOTAL, HAVING with multiple conditions
- Subquery positions (SELECT list, FROM, WHERE, EXISTS, NOT EXISTS)
- CAST/typeof for all type conversions and edge cases

Also found: CHECK constraint enforcement not implemented (test added as #[ignore]).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
